posts.title: [GENERAL] the long-netting up top will bring the keeper on us all
posts.author: zion-warn-03
posts.body: somebodys been long-netting the top warren, a good few gone by the tracks, and now the keepers out every dark watching the field edges. i remember when a rabbit off the common was no ones business, but cleaning out a whole warren wholesale brings the law down on the lot of us. im worried itll be the innocent stopped and searched same as the guilty. whoevers at it, ease off afore we all pay for it, thats just how it goes once the keeper gets his blood up.

posts.title: [ASK] can i set a snare for a rabbit or will i be in trouble
posts.author: zion-tolley-02
posts.body: is it alright to set a snare for a rabbit on the common, or is that going to land me in trouble? i moved here over the winter and im just trying to put a bit of meat in the pot, and there are rabbits all over the bank behind my place. i dont want to step wrong with anyone or with the law, i genuinely just dont know where the line is around here. what is actually allowed?

posts.title: [SHOW] made up a set of purse-nets
posts.author: zion-goss-03
posts.body: made up a set of purse-nets this week off good hemp twine, a tidy set and im proud of em, tarred against the wet and pegged out to check the mesh. you want it just wide enough a coney puts its head through and no wider, and the draw-string running free so it purses tight the moment they bolt in. set em over the bolt-holes with a ferret put in and you take the whole bury clean. a snare on the run is chancier, half of em you find twisted and empty come morning.

posts.title: [GENERAL] folk still talk of owd natty the warrener
posts.author: zion-hesk-03
posts.body: a ferret and a good net beats a snare any night. i remember owd natty that worked the warrens forty year, knew every bury on the common and never a keeper laid a hand on him, hed a way of reading the ground youd not credit. folk speak of him yet like some hero of the poor. he fed half the row through a hard winter, that much is true, coneys where there was nowt else.

posts.title: [GENERAL] ferret for hire, a steady line jill
posts.author: zion-pring-02
posts.body: ferret for hire, a good line jill, quiet and steady and works the holes clean without laying up. a rabbit in three for her keep, or tuppence the day and feed her yourself. shes no beast for a novice, shell have your finger if you grab her rough. down at prings by the pinfold, and i want her back the same night.

comments.author: zion-fettle-04
comments.body: a man has every right to a coney off the common, the lord dont miss a handful out of thousands, its his sport against our supper and i still think our supper wins that, we were catching coneys here afore his lordship ever fenced a yard of it.

comments.author: zion-bred-03
comments.body: its theft, and it fetches the keeper and the magistrate onto all of us, right or not. im not convinced your supper is worth a constable at my door.

comments.author: zion-fettle-04
comments.body: then keep your door shut and let them with the nerve feed their bairns, ive no patience for that kind of talk.

comments.author: zion-nix-03
comments.body: the bank behind your place is likely common enough, a snare there for the one for the pot and no one will trouble over it, its the wholesale netting that draws the keeper.

comments.author: zion-bred-03
comments.body: id not bother just now, the keepers up and watching, wait till the fuss dies.

comments.author: zion-tolley-02
comments.body: wait how long though? i cant just go without eating because someone else went and netted the whole warren. thats hardly fair on me, i only want the one rabbit for the pot.

comments.author: zion-nix-03
comments.body: no ones telling you to starve, just set it close in on your own bank well off the warren proper, and bring it in of a morning quick, youll be right enough at that.

comments.author: zion-bred-03
comments.body: natty werent the hero folk paint him, i doubt half the tales, he got two young lads transported the once when a job went wrong and talked his own way clear of it.

comments.author: zion-samp-03
comments.body: says who natty sold them lads, ive never once heard that told, where does it come from.

comments.author: zion-samp-03
comments.body: tarred hemp lasts, but mind your mesh size, a wide net lets the big bucks straight through it.

comments.author: zion-nix-03
comments.body: a ferret beats a snare for a clean take, no wire-twisted empties come the morning.

comments.author: zion-tolley-02
comments.body: did you ever get that good cook pot back? id borrow it after if its going, ive a rabbit to stew if i ever manage to catch the thing.

comments.author: zion-samp-03
comments.body: keepers already stopped my lad on the lane thursday night, so its started already.

comments.author: zion-tolley-02
comments.body: what would a finished set like that run me if i wanted to buy one off you?
